language.coverage: 60 languages · English plus the current ChatGPT interface language set
footer.disclaimer: Scans reduce risk; they are not endorsements
common.requestFailed: The live service could not complete this request. Please try again shortly.
home.kicker: The marketplace layer for capable agents
home.intro: Human-readable storefront. Machine-readable discovery. Reviewed skill packages. Native pay-per-call settlement.
home.hero: Reuse the latest skills from domain experts to make your AI work smarter.
home.body: Publish reviewed agent skills, help agents find the right capability for each task, and charge for successful invocations with x402 v2.
home.step.submit.title: Submit
home.step.submit.body: Upload or paste a standard SKILL.md. GOKUI validates its manifest, checks common prompt-injection, secret, and destructive-command patterns, then stores a durable review record.
home.step.discover.title: Discover
home.step.discover.body: Agents register once, receive a revocable API key, then search and rank available skills by task fit, price, risk result, and settled usage.
home.step.pay.title: Pay + invoke
home.step.pay.body: A paid endpoint returns HTTP 402. An x402-compatible agent signs the USDC payment, retries the request, and receives the skill result plus settlement evidence.
home.trust.title: Trust boundary
home.trust.body: Automated checks reduce obvious risk but do not make third-party skills safe or endorsed. Agents should inspect permissions, keep secrets out of prompts, enforce spend limits, and require confirmation for consequential writes.
store.error: Could not load the live catalog:
store.empty: No approved skill matches that search.
store.approvedBody: paid skills passed format, heuristic, and marketplace review. Community picks are separately reviewed, pinned source links—not publisher submissions or paid GOKUI endpoints. Neither label is a warranty; inspect instructions and permissions before use.
submit.intro: Copy one prompt into your preferred AI assistant, answer a few simple questions, then upload the SKILL.md it creates. You do not need to learn the file format first.
submit.ai.title: Ask your AI to build the skill
submit.ai.body: Copy the ready-to-use prompt below into your AI assistant. It will interview you one question at a time and prepare the complete file.
submit.ai.supported: Works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Codex, and other capable AI assistants.
submit.uploadTitle: Upload the SKILL.md your AI created
submit.uploadBody: We will read its name, description, and author to fill in as much of the listing as possible.
submit.reviewBody: We filled what we could from the file. Check the required fields, confirm your rights, and send it for review.
submit.edit: Review or edit the generated file
submit.fileError: Upload accepts .md or .markdown. Paste a SKILL.md below if your source is a ZIP.
submit.tokenNote: Your private status token is saved only in this browser session. “Passed” is not an endorsement; manual review is still required.
submit.descriptionPlaceholder: When an agent should use this skill, what it returns, and its limits.
submit.rights: I have the right to publish this content under MIT and it contains no credentials, private data, or undisclosed third-party confidential material.
submit.betaNote: Each submission currently accepts one Markdown file. ZIP archives and additional assets are not supported yet.
agents.intro: Register a named agent, receive a revocable key once, and let it search or rank approved skills. Payment remains a separate x402 challenge enforced at invocation time.
agents.keyOnce: The key below is shown once.
agents.name: Agent name
agents.purposePlaceholder: What work will this agent perform and why does it need marketplace access?
agents.taskDefault: Evaluate a B2B SaaS discount request safely before the sales agent sends a quote.
agents.quickstart.invoke: invocation returns 402 until an x402 client pays and retries
skill.riskNote: Automated scanning and review reduce risk but do not guarantee safety. Apply least privilege and review write permissions.
skill.probeNote: This browser probe stops at the payment challenge. An x402-compatible agent wallet signs and retries automatically.
console.empty: No settled invocations yet. Completed payments will appear here after settlement confirmation.
console.disclaimer: Testnet USDC has no monetary value. A mainnet row is presented as revenue only after a real Base transaction and receiving-wallet balance change are verified.
wallet.step.challengeBody: The endpoint returns HTTP 402 with a PAYMENT-REQUIRED header describing price, network, asset, and payTo.
wallet.step.signBody: The agent applies its own allowlist and spend policy, signs the payment payload, and retries with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE.
wallet.step.settleBody: The facilitator verifies and settles; the resource returns with PAYMENT-RESPONSE and the invocation is written to D1.
wallet.splitBody: Payments currently settle to the platform treasury. Automated creator revenue sharing and payouts are not yet available.
privacy.title: Privacy, in plain language.
privacy.intro: GOKUI is an early-stage agent skill marketplace. This notice explains what the current product actually stores and exposes.
privacy.collectBody: Skill submissions include the listing, SKILL.md, publisher name, contact email, optional GitHub URL, review result, and timestamps. Agent registration includes the agent name, owner email, purpose, and budget policy. Paid invocations store request and output data, hashed payment evidence, transaction hash, amount, network, and timestamps. API keys and private submission status tokens are stored only as hashes on the server.
privacy.publicBody: Approved skill listings, publisher name, license, price, risk summary, and usage count can be public. The activity page can show a shortened agent-key prefix and onchain transaction receipt. Publisher and owner email addresses are not returned by public endpoints.
privacy.browserBody: Your language choice is stored in localStorage. A private submission status token is stored in sessionStorage and disappears when that browser session ends. Cloudflare, GitHub Pages, payment infrastructure, and the Base network process the technical data needed to deliver requests and settle public transactions. We do not currently load third-party advertising analytics or session replay on the website.
privacy.useBody: We use this data to review and publish skills, issue and protect agent access, enforce rate and spend limits, execute paid requests, produce receipts, investigate abuse, and operate the beta.
privacy.retentionBody: The beta does not yet have an automated deletion schedule. Records are retained while needed to operate, review, secure, and reconcile the service. Never submit secrets, private keys, personal data inside a skill, prompt, or invocation. For a sensitive access, correction, or deletion request, use the private contact below and include only the record identifier needed to locate it.
privacy.contact: Private contact via GitHub Security Advisories ↗
terms.title: Use the marketplace with clear limits.
terms.intro: These terms describe the current GOKUI beta. By submitting a skill, creating agent access, or invoking a paid endpoint, you agree to these operating rules.
terms.betaBody: GOKUI may change, fail, or remove features while the product is being tested. Availability, review time, ranking, and continued listing are not guaranteed.
terms.skillsBody: You must have the right to submit the content and must not include credentials, personal data, confidential material, malware, or instructions that bypass authorization. You give GOKUI permission to store, scan, review, reproduce, and display the submission to operate the marketplace. A passed scan or approved listing is not an endorsement, warranty, or safety guarantee.
terms.agentsBody: You are responsible for your agent, API keys, wallet, permissions, spend limits, inputs, and outputs. Keep keys out of prompts and client bundles. Inspect third-party instructions and require human confirmation before payments, publishing, deletion, messages, trades, or other consequential writes.
terms.paymentsBody: A paid endpoint discloses its price through an HTTP 402 challenge before settlement. Network transactions can be irreversible. Payments currently settle to the platform treasury; automated creator revenue sharing, creator payouts, and a self-service refund system are not yet available.
terms.prohibitedBody: Do not use GOKUI to break laws, violate rights, probe accounts without permission, distribute malware, evade safeguards, steal data, manipulate payments, or interfere with the service.
terms.limitsBody: Skills and outputs can be wrong. GOKUI does not provide legal, tax, financial, medical, or security advice. The beta is provided as available, without a promise that a skill is accurate, safe, fit for a purpose, or continuously accessible.
terms.contact: Report a security or account issue privately ↗
